hooks.name: GPX Round Trip Validation
hooks.description: Validates newly created bike/hike GPX files: checks trk/trkseg/trkpt format, verifies start ≈ end (round trip), and reports trackpoint count.

action.prompt:
A new GPX file was created. Validate the following:
1. Does the file use `<trk>/<trkseg>/<trkpt>` format (NOT `<rte>/<rtept>`)?
2. Is the first trackpoint identical or very close to the last trackpoint (round trip)?
3. How many trackpoints does the file contain?
If any issues are found, inform the user.
